---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# NPZ

## basic interation

```{julia}
using NPZ

vec = [1, 2]

npzwrite(
    "./04_package/files_interation/basic.npz",
    Dict(
        "vec" => vec
    ),
)

data = npzread("./04_package/files_interation/basic.npz")
vec = data["vec"]

```
